items.front: What is the wind-speed threshold between using the most-aligned runway and the calm-wind runway?
items.back: 5 knots. 5 knots or more = most aligned runway. Less than 5 knots = calm wind runway.

items.front: Who makes the final determination of which runways are in use?
When may a STOL runway be assigned?
items.back: Only when requested by the pilot or as specified in a letter of agreement with an aircraft operator.

items.front: What must be stated when authorizing use of a runway with a tailwind component?
items.back: Always state both wind direction and velocity. Calm may be described when appropriate (i.e., when the wind actually is calm).
